allow: Bash(echo -e "hello\\nsummarize 这是一段关于人工智能发展的测试文本，用来验证摘要功能是否正常工作\\nresearch 这是一段关于人工智能发展的测试文本\\nquit" | npx tsx src/index.ts 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'hello\\nsummarize 这是一段关于人工智能发展的测试文本用来验证摘要功能是否正常工作\\nresearch 这是一段关于人工智能发展的测试文本\\nquit\\n' | npx tsx src/index.ts 2>&1)
Bash(echo 'hello' | node --import tsx/esm src/index.ts 2>&1 || echo 'hello' | npx tsx --no-warnings src/index.ts 2>&1)

Bash(curl -sL "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw-ai/openclaw/contents/src/brain" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name']\) for d in data if isinstance\(data, list\)]" 2>/dev/null || echo "not found")
Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-Mha3mQ9RHvG4HPPqeXFaHNTA7KcjOgBQzo8lxzkDwTxspMIN OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.tu-zi.com/v1 OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-5.4 echo "你好" | npx tsx src/index.ts 2>&1)
Bash(echo "你好" | OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-Mha3mQ9RHvG4HPPqeXFaHNTA7KcjOgBQzo8lxzkDwTxspMIN OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.tu-zi.com/v1 OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o npx tsx src/index.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 50 "📤")
Bash(echo "你好" | OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-Mha3mQ9RHvG4HPPqeXFaHNTA7KcjOgBQzo8lxzkDwTxspMIN OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.tu-zi.com/v1 OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o npx tsx src/index.ts 2>&1 | tail -80)

Bash(cat > test-greet.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
export OPENAI_API_KEY=hk-rzgh1a1000054580577c9c19d1578ee4761b63ff56371f41
export OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai-hk.com/v1
export OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o

EOF
chmod +x test-greet.sh)
Bash(echo "你好" | OPENAI_API_KEY=hk-rzgh1a1000054580577c9c19d1578ee4761b63ff56371f41 OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai-hk.com/v1 OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o npx tsx src/index.ts 2>&1 | tail -60)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/git/trees/main?recursive=1" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in data.get\('tree',[]\) if any\(k in f['path'].lower\(\) for k in ['skill','prompt','format']\)]" 2>&1 | head -40)
